name: Crisp Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugars and the butter until the mixture is very smooth.
2. Blend in the egg and vanilla extract.
3. Mix in the oatmeal.
4. Sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
5. Blend the sifted ingredients into the dough.
6. The dough will be very soft. Let it stand for a few minutes to firm up.
7. Meanwhile, preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto a cookie sheet, leaving about 2 inches between each mound.
9. Sprinkle each mounded with some ground walnuts, pressing them into the dough and flattening the cookies at the same time.
10. Bake for 10 minutes, or until the cookies are uniformly brown.
Makes approximately 18 cookies, 4 1/2 inches in diameter.
